name: What evidence do I need for my work ladder fall claim in West Valley City?
description: Photos, medicals, witnesses, reports—lawyer gathers more.

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for my work ladder fall claim in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Photos, medicals, witnesses, reports—lawyer gathers more.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Photos/videos of ladder, fall site, defects; medical records; witness statements; incident report.**[2][7]

Proves work-relatedness, especially if ladder unstable or defective.

- Supervisor logs, OSHA complaints if safety violations.
- Expert reports on ladder misuse.

Preserve ladder—don't let employer discard it.

Lawyers subpoena records and build ironclad files.
